title: triticum spontaneum var. zuccarinii
intro: Triticum spontaneum var. zuccarinii is a wild variety of wheat, scientifically known as a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Triticum spontaneum var. zuccarinii include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
